lines.text: Your trust means a lot, Priest Alessio. The "Flower" has been quite... effective.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I understand. That's why we seek "unity" and "integration."
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Our beliefs are already one. This is also the destiny They intend.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Excellent. Everything is in place. Now, all we need is Her Majesty's approval.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: O great Imperator. May you raise the tides, deliver your edict to our Queen, and let the clouds cover Ragunna, cleansing it of the wickedness left by the pleasure-seekers of this city of transgression.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: O Divinity in the Abyss, Lord of Tides and Riddles, may you soon be freed. Let all lies melt away under your power. May you grant me strength to overcome all who oppose you.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: You must be that outlander, right? The news of your arrival is all over Ragunna...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Since you're here, I guess you've uncovered quite a bit... Though it's insignificant compared to the truth beneath the tides.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: As a gesture of goodwill, let me offer a word of advice: Curiosity won't lead you to the truth you seek, but rather closer to—
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Merely the neccessary sacrifices for our one true Divinity.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Do you really think you've won? No, it's already too late... Haha...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I might just be a pawn, insignificant and small, but while you're focusing on me, you've missed something far more important.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Ha. Muahahaha! Magnificent! Lorelei is now ours for the taking... Just as the prophecy foretold! All shall be cleansed!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Now, let us wait in patience as the sea of clouds descends to engulf that corrupted city. Only the faithful will rise anew from the tides!
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
